title: maria scaphigera
intro: Maria scaphigera, also known as the "Horned Poppy," is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Papaveraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and analgesic properties. It has been known to provide various health benefits, such as relief from pain, inflammation, and fever, as well as aiding in wound healing and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of Maria scaphigera include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
